name: Fungal Fiefdom
short_description: Fungal Fiefdom is a 3D Tower defense, fungi vs robots. Strategically place defensive mushrooms and use powerful abilities to protect your colony and advance against the evil automatons.
detailed_description:
Place mushrooms and use abilities

Tactically use mushroom and ability cards from your deck. Place fungi carefully to make best use of their unique capabilities and traits. Activate abilities at the right moment to provide strategic buffs, or create an opening to push forward.

Manage resources and collect cards

Gather organic matter to spend when using cards. Make use of abilities and natural mushroom generation to maintain a constant supply of this critical resource. Obtain a growing collection of over 25 unique mushroom, ability, and lichen cards.

(Warning: Some cards may contain terrible mushroom puns)

Grow your influence

Steadily spread an area of mycelium across the map. Propagate the area dynamically over various types of terrain, some harder to penetrate than others. Weave through the randomly generated terrain objects to expand the mycological domain.

Destroy the Robots

Fight against an increasingly challenging invasion of enemies. Destroy the spawning outposts and salvage powerful rewards. Finally, advance up to the robot base to put an end to the invasion.
